GLORACLE.title: Oracles
GLORACLE.hint: A multi-genre oracle library for solo and GM-lite play: an Ironsworn-style yes/no oracle, universal Action/Theme and Descriptor/Focus prompts, and swappable genre packs (sci-fi, fantasy, dark fantasy, modern occult, urban gothic, dieselpunk, arcanepunk) with full generators for characters, places, factions and more. GM-only.

primaryPack.name: Primary genre pack
primaryPack.hint: The pack whose Character / Place / Settlement / Faction / Creature / Encounter / Theme / Complication shortcuts fill the panel's quick-roll row.

pack.hint: Enabled packs appear in the oracle browser and are loaded on demand. Disabled packs are never loaded.

ask.label: Ask the Oracle
ask.hint: Decide the odds of a yes, then roll. On a match, envision an extreme result or twist.

match.label: MATCH
match.hint: Match — envision an extreme result, interesting twist, or dramatic complication.

log.title: Results
log.empty: No rolls yet. Ask a question or pick a table.
log.shiftTip: Shift-click any roll to expand every linked table in one go.
